title: fumaria abyssinica
intro: Fumaria abyssinica, also known as Abyssinian fumitory, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the fumitory family. It is native to Ethiopia and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits associated with Fumaria abyssinica include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. Fumaria abyssinica is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and as a remedy for snake bites.
